# KeyNestHub

> Kenya's premier real estate platform — buy, sell, and rent verified properties with AI-powered search and trusted agents.

KeyNestHub connects buyers, sellers, landlords, tenants, and agents across Kenya. All listings are verified and all inquiries are mediated by approved agents for buyer protection.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse featured verified properties for sale and rent.
- [Discover](/discover): Interactive map with AI-powered property search.
- [Buy Residential](/buy/residential): Houses and apartments for sale.
- [Buy Commercial](/buy/commercial): Commercial properties for sale.
- [Buy Land](/buy/land): Plots and land for sale.
- [Buy New Developments](/buy/new-developments): Newly built developments.
- [Rent Apartments](/rent/apartments): Apartments for long-term rent.
- [Rent Houses](/rent/houses): Houses for long-term rent.
- [Rent Office Spaces](/rent/office-spaces): Office space rentals.
- [Short-Term Rentals](/rent/short-term): Short-stay and holiday rentals.
- [List Property](/sell/list-property): Create a property listing.
- [Pricing Plans](/sell/pricing-plans): Subscription tiers for sellers.
- [Agent Assistance](/sell/agent-assistance): Sell with a verified agent.
- [Find an Agent](/agents/find-agent): Browse the agent directory.
- [Agents Directory](/agents/directory): Full list of verified agents.
- [Become an Agent](/become-agent): Apply to join as a verified agent.
- [Property Trends](/market/property-trends): Kenyan real estate market insights.
- [Neighborhood Guides](/neighborhoods): Hyper-local area profiles.
- [Investment Tips](/investment-tips): Real estate investment strategies.
- [Mortgage Calculator](/mortgage-calculator): Calculate mortgage payments.
- [About](/about): About KeyNestHub and contact form.
- [Install App](/install): Install the KeyNestHub mobile app.

## Optional

- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Account access (auth required).
